<!-- source-snippet repo="splice-wallet-kernel" path="docs/wallet-integration-guide/examples/snippets/create-topology-transactions.ts" commit="fd1b4b3e5fd5daad189225cb2b585a0ab3b5f67f" snippet="docs/wallet-integration-guide/examples/snippets/create-topology-transactions" location="fullFile" -->
```typescript
  import { SDK, localNetStaticConfig } from '@canton-network/wallet-sdk'

  export default async function () {
      // it is important to configure the SDK correctly else you might run into connectivity or authentication issues
      const sdk = await SDK.create({
          auth: global.TOKEN_PROVIDER_CONFIG_DEFAULT,
          ledgerClientUrl: localNetStaticConfig.LOCALNET_APP_USER_LEDGER_URL,
      })
      const key = sdk.keys.generate()

      // partyHint is optional but recommended to make it easier to identify the party
      const partyHint = 'my-wallet-1'

      const prepared = sdk.party.external.create(key.publicKey, {
          partyHint,
      })

      await prepared.topology()
  }

```
